subject: Metang — blue-grey metallic dual-claw Pokemon hovering in a rocky cavern environment
description: A blue-grey metallic creature with a broad, flat body and two forward-extending claw-like appendages hovers in the foreground. The body has a cross-shaped or plus-sign feature on its central torso section, and small red dot-like eyes are visible on the front. The rocky cave or cavern walls form the background, with dark stone textures and some lighter rocky surfaces visible. The overall palette is cool blue-grey with warm brown-tan cave stone. The creature projects a solid, armored presence.
foreground: metallic blue-grey floating creature with two claw arms and cross-shaped torso marking
background: rocky cave or cavern walls with dark stone textures
emotion: stoic, impassive — no readable expression, mechanical presence
